News & events

From the field.

Outreach drives, scholarship awards, leadership workshops and the everyday moments that move our mission forward.

Outreach•May 2026

Back-to-School drive reaches four new communities

Hundreds of children received enrolment support and learning kits ahead of the new term — and four new partner schools joined the RECI network. Read how the campaign came together, and meet some of the students returning to class.

Read the full story

320 new scholarships awarded this term

A record cohort begins the year with full enrolment support secured.

Youth Leadership Summit inspires 500 students

New STEM lab opens for girls in tech

Mentor cohort grows to 650 volunteers

More role models means more young people who feel seen and supported.

Year-end celebration honours top students

Families and partners gathered to celebrate a year of growth.

Learning materials reach 12 rural schools

Books and supplies delivered to classrooms that needed them most.
